strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: As the player becomes skilled, Radd becomes more confident.
strings.panel.p2.narration.1.html: Radd finds himself enjoying the games now, even respecting the player.
strings.panel.p3.narration.1.html: So now Radd and the player form a sort of partnership.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.left.html: Uh... but I still like chicks, okay?
strings.panel.p4.narration.1.html: ...The player being the more mature partner, of course.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.left.html: I mean it! We're just friends!
